description_long: This is a brown plaid-patterned deerstalker hat, commonly associated with detective attire. The hat features a rounded, segmented crown with a button at the top and two prominent, short brims extending from the front and back. The fabric appears to be a woven wool or tweed, giving it a textured, matte finish. The hat's side panels are slightly flared, and the overall construction is soft and flexible, designed to fit snugly on the head. There are no visible decorative elements such as ribbons or logos, maintaining a classic and understated look. The color palette consists of various shades of brown and beige, creating a subtle checkered effect.
description: A brown plaid deerstalker hat with a rounded crown, dual short brims, and a textured woolen finish.
description_view_0: Front view shows the short, flat front brim and the rounded, segmented crown with a central button.
description_view_1: Rear angled view highlights the back brim and the dome-like crown structure.
description_view_2: Another front view, similar to view 0, emphasizing the symmetry of the brims and crown.
description_view_3: Rear view displays the back brim and the full curvature of the crown.
attribute_brim_style: dual short, flat brims (front and back)
